title: Most Budgets Fail In The First Week

claims.claim: A majority of new budgets are abandoned within the first week.
claims.quote: Most participants stopped tracking within seven days.

scenes.narration: Most new budgets do not survive the first week.

visual.headline: is how long most budgets last

scenes.narration: The problem is not discipline. It is design.

visual.subtitle: Budgets fail by design, not willpower.

scenes.narration: In one study most participants stopped tracking within seven days.

visual.label: days before most budgets are abandoned
visual.subtitle: Tracking stops long before payday.

scenes.narration: Design the budget around your habits, not against them.

visual.setup: Willpower runs out. Systems do not.
visual.question: DOES YOUR BUDGET FIT YOUR WEEK?
visual.subtitle: Build the system around real behaviour.
